text.div:
Care Plan for Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan (record artifact).
Care plan is meant to treat Chronic obstructive bronchitis (disorder).
Activities:
  • Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan (record artifact)
  • Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease clinical management plan (record artifact)
